subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Be thou not sorrowful, neither let grief overtake thee, for in these mentioned events there is divine wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید محزون مباش مغموم مگرد در وقوعات مذکوره حکمت
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
